model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Switch to decoupled weight decay with AdamW and slightly stronger regularization to improve short-horizon optimization and validation loss in the 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":["caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 3e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Increase the initial step size so the model makes more progress within the fixed 256-step budget; cosine decay will still anneal later steps for stability.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 3e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 4e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Probe a slightly higher learning rate to push faster early optimization under the fixed-step budget while keeping the same optimizer and cosine decay.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 64","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Increase batch size to reduce gradient noise and improve stability at the current higher learning-rate regime under a fixed number of optimizer steps.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"    warmup_steps = min(max(1, WARMUP_EPOCHS * steps_per_epoch), max(1, total_steps // 2))","new":"    warmup_steps = min(max(1, WARMUP_EPOCHS * steps_per_epoch), max(1, total_steps // 4))","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"Reduce warmup duration so the run spends more of the 256-step budget at higher effective learning rates before cosine decay.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Relax regularization to allow better fit under the short training horizon, where stronger weight decay can underfit before convergence.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.99)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Use a shorter second-moment timescale so AdamW adapts faster in the limited 256-step regime.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 4e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 3.5e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Slightly reduce the peak learning rate to improve late-step stability with the faster AdamW moment setting and warmup-cosine schedule.","secondary_modes":["indexing","summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 3.5e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 4e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Revert to the better-performing learning rate after the 3.5e-3 trial regressed validation loss.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Add mild dropout regularization to improve generalization now that optimization is strong with large-batch high-LR AdamW.","secondary_modes":["layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Revert dropout because it significantly worsened validation loss in this short-budget setting.","secondary_modes":["layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Test a larger batch to further reduce gradient noise and improve generalization under the fixed-step evaluator.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 512","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Increase batch size further to leverage the fixed-step budget for more dataset coverage and potentially lower validation loss.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 512","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 1024","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Push batch size higher to increase data coverage per optimizer step in the fixed-step regime and test whether validation loss keeps improving.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 1024","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 2048","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Continue scaling batch size to maximize unique-sample throughput across fixed optimizer steps and test for further validation-loss gains.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 2048","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 4096","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Scale batch size again to maximize sample throughput per fixed optimizer step and test whether loss continues to drop.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 4096","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 8192","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"With only two trials left, test whether even larger batches further improve fixed-step efficiency by exposing more examples per optimizer update.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 8192","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 16384","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Final high-impact probe: maximize batch size to further increase sample coverage per fixed optimizer step, which has consistently reduced validation loss in this run.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}
